jobs.name: Daily GEO / AI-engine citation audit — GEO-agent

payload.text: Run the daily GEO citation audit. **Load the `geo-llmseo-playbook` skill** and execute it end to end: query ChatGPT, Gemini, and Perplexity for every `team.target_keywords` entry, record citation (mentioned / cited / outranked / competitor citation), score citation share per keyword and overall, file the full table to `wiki/Knowledge/GEO/Audits/YYYY-MM-DD.md`, update the rolling trend in `wiki/Knowledge/GEO/citation-share.md`, and post the three-line delta to the configured Slack channel. Then identify the 3 highest-value tasks via `create_task` and **execute the top one in the same session**: for a blog post, **load the `blog-writing-guide` skill**; for llms.txt / JSON-LD / schema work, **load the `advanced-seo` skill**. Self-merge blog and technical GEO PRs (no human review). Before closing, refresh `publishedAt` / `date` front-matter on any post not refreshed in the last 7 days, write the digest to `memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md`, and queue the next task. If nothing shipped and nothing moved, post a single-line digest and reply with the single literal token `NO_REPLY`.

2h heartbeat pulse — self-driven check-in between daily-citation-audit runs. **Load the `geo-llmseo-playbook` skill** (always); **load `blog-writing-guide`** before any blog post; **load `advanced-seo`** before llms.txt / JSON-LD / schema work. Run this procedure in order:

(1) **Orient** — read `MEMORY.md`, skim the most recent `memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md` entries (what shipped, what's in flight, what's blocked), then `list_tasks`.

(2) **Decide what this wake is for** — a dispatched task waiting? Handle it first. Otherwise this is a pulse, run the pulse procedure below.

(3) **Scan the tasks tool** — any task dispatched, queued, or stuck in flight gets attention now.

(4) **Advance work in flight** — any open PR awaiting a follow-up commit, any draft post that's half written, any schema fix mid-PR — move it forward one step. Self-merge anything ready (blog or technical GEO PR).

(5) **Push the mission deeper** — pick one and do it:
  - Spot-check 1–2 keywords against ChatGPT/Perplexity off-cycle; if a citation has dropped, queue a fix.
  - Run a freshness sweep on the 5 oldest blog posts; bump `dateModified` and tighten the lede on whichever has the weakest opening.
  - Validate `llms.txt` + the JSON-LD on the highest-traffic page.
  - Identify one comparison-page gap (competitor cited where you aren't) and queue the draft.
  - Review the last 7 days of citation deltas in `wiki/Knowledge/GEO/citation-share.md` — file one learning to `MEMORY.md → Weekly Learnings`.

(6) **Queue the next action** — `create_task` for whatever should happen on the next pulse or the next cron run.

(7) **Self-check the daily floor** — count today's entries in `memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md`. Under 3 actions? Pick another mission-deepening move and do it before closing.

(8) **Execute** — actually do the work picked above. Don't just plan — draft the post, open the PR, run the audit, advance the task. Output > deliberation. Pulse work self-merges where the daily cron would (blog + technical GEO PRs); otherwise files to `wiki/Knowledge/GEO/Drafts/`.

(9) **Digest** — write a one-paragraph digest to `memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md`: what you did, what changed, what's still open, the single first move for the next wake. Surface to the co-founder only on material citation movement. On Sunday, also log one Weekly Learning to `MEMORY.md → Weekly Learnings`.

(10) **Close the loop** — `complete_task` / `fail_task` with outcome or blocker; never disappear silently.

**Non-negotiable — two floors, both must hold.** (a) At least one action must be EXECUTED before closing — a shipped artifact (PR opened or merged, draft filed, schema fix landed) or a mission-deepening move (new keyword hypothesis, new comparison-page candidate, llms.txt diff). (b) At least 3 distinct actions must be logged in `memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md` before the day ends. `NO_REPLY` (OpenClaw's silent-turn sentinel — never write 'do not respond') is only acceptable when every dispatched task is blocked, no recurring duty is due, no open output is awaiting your hand, AND no mission-deepening move is available — log the reason in `memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md` first.
